title: <div>- What’s your preferred documentation style? Narrative essay? Structured sp
content:
- What’s your preferred documentation style? Narrative essay? Structured specs? Visual diagrams? Hybrid?
- Do you want to shape the downstream recruitment strategy as we go, or focus purely on your own work and let me handle outreach?
- What’s your ideal communication cadence? Weekly? Bi-weekly? Async?

I’m serious: **we figure out the format that serves your thinking**. Not the other way around.

-----

**THE FUNDING LANDSCAPE & ECONOMIC VIABILITY**

Here’s where this becomes concrete: I have substantial funding opportunities in the pipeline, and your contribution will be compensated once those lands. This isn’t speculative; it’s based on documented grant programs with specific amounts and timelines.

**Tier 1: Immediate Deadlines (Summer 2025)**

- **Ars Electronica / Mozarteum XR Residency**: €40,000 (EUR ~$43K USD). Deadline: July 13, 2025. This program explicitly funds interactive, audience-responsive performance systems across all artistic disciplines. Alignment: 10/10. The project description matches almost exactly what we’re building.
